description_long: This object is a tall, slender street light with a single, slightly curved pole that supports a modern, streamlined lamp head at the top. The pole is smooth and cylindrical, with no visible ornamentation or decorative features, and it appears to be constructed from metal, likely steel or aluminum, for durability and weather resistance. The lamp head is compact and rectangular, with a slightly angled design that directs light downward, and it may contain an integrated LED fixture behind a protective cover. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments such as city streets, sidewalks, or parking lots. The surface finish is matte or slightly smooth, with a dark, neutral color that blends into urban settings. There are no visible access panels, switches, or interactive components aside from the lamp head itself.
description: A tall, modern street light with a smooth, curved metal pole and a compact, downward-angled lamp head. The design is minimalist and functional, with a dark matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gentle curve of the pole and the angled lamp head at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the straight, vertical alignment of the pole and the narrow profile of the lamp head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the same curved pole and lamp head, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the straight pole and the back of the lamp head, with minimal visible detail.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, compact rectangular lamp head with a slightly angled, streamlined profile and a protective cover, likely housing an LED fixture. No decorative elements or diffusers are visible.
